summary.title: MCP Threat Model
summary.description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) is an open-source standard for connecting AI applications to external systems.

threats.title: Client side - Impersonation
threats.description: Attackers pretend to be valid clients to access the system without authorization.
threats.mitigation: Defences include providing enforcement of behavioral workflow and anti-automation

threats.title: Client side - Insecure Communication
threats.description: Data exchanged between client and server can be intercepted or altered.
threats.mitigation: Defence includes providing anti-automation

threats.title: Client side - Operational Errors
threats.description: Mismatch between client and server schemas causes system malfunctions.
threats.mitigation: Mitigation or prevention such as providing backoff, resource management and avoiding forced deadlock

threats.title: Client side - Unpredictable Behavior
threats.description: Model instability results in irregular or disruptive requests.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Host side - AI Model Vulnerabilities
threats.description: Faulty outputs or exploited weaknesses disrupt MCP function.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Host side - Host System Compromise
threats.description: Host machine compromise leads to unauthorized privilege escalation.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: LLM01: Prompt Injection
threats.description: Malicious prompts manipulate model behavior or leak data.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: LLM02: Insecure Output Handling
threats.description: Poor validation of model responses exposes sensitive data or executes unintended actions.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: LLM03: Training Data Poisoning
threats.description: Tampered training data reduces model accuracy or integrity.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: LLM04: Model Denial of Service
threats.description: Resource-intensive prompts disrupt normal model operation.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: LLM05: Supply Chain Vulnerabilities
threats.description: Compromised datasets or dependencies reduce trustworthiness.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: LLM06: Sensitive Information Disclosure
threats.description: Model outputs unintentionally reveal confidential information.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: LLM07: Insecure Plugin Design
threats.description: Poor plugin controls enable unauthorized system actions.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: LLM08: Excessive Agency
threats.description: Overly autonomous models make unsafe or unauthorized decisions
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: LLM09: Overreliance
threats.description: Blind trust in model outputs leads to security or decision errors.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: LLM10: Model Theft
threats.description: Unauthorized access to model parameters or structure exposes proprietary assets.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Compromise and Unauthorized Access
threats.description: Misconfigurations or insecure setups allow intruder access.
threats.mitigation: Defences include providing enforcement of behavioral workflow and anti-automation

threats.title: Exploitation of Functions
threats.description: Attackers misuse tools to perform unintended or harmful operations
threats.mitigation: Defence includes providing anti-automation

threats.title: Denial of Service
threats.description: Overloading the server with excessive or looping requests disrupts service
threats.mitigation: Mitigation or prevention such as providing backoff, resource management and avoiding forced deadlock

threats.title: Vulnerable Communication
threats.description: Data transmitted between entities may be intercepted or modified.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Client Interference
threats.description: Lack of isolation allows one client’s activity to affect others.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Data Leakage and Compliance Violations
threats.description: Sensitive data is exfiltrated or mishandled, breaching regulations.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Insufficient Auditability
threats.description: Weak or missing logs make security incident investigation difficult.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Server Spoofing
threats.description: Fake servers imitate legitimate ones to deceive users or systems.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Data - Insufficient Access Control
threats.description: Weak data protection permits unauthorized access.

threats.title: Data Integrity Issues
threats.description: Altered or inconsistent data leads to incorrect outcomes.
threats.mitigation: Defence includes providing anti-automation

threats.title: Data Exfiltration
threats.description: Confidential data is extracted without authorization.
threats.mitigation: Mitigation or prevention such as providing backoff, resource management and avoiding forced deadlock

threats.title: Tool - Functional Misuse
threats.description: Tools are used beyond their intended security scope.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Tool - Resource Exhaustion
threats.description: Excessive tool use depletes available resources.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Tool - Tool Poisoning
threats.description: Malicious modifications corrupt tool metadata or functionality.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Eavesdropping Access Tokens
threats.description: Tokens intercepted during transmission are reused by attackers.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Obtaining Access Tokens from Authorization Server Database
threats.description: Attackers exploit database vulnerabilities to retrieve tokens by gaining access to the database or launching a SQL injection attack.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Disclosure of Client Credentials during Transmission
threats.description:
Login credentials are intercepted during the client
   authentication process or during OAuth token requests.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Obtaining Client Secret from Authorization Server Database
threats.description: Valid client credentials are extracted from stored data
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Obtaining Client Secret by Online Guessing
threats.description: Attackers attempt to brute-force valid client ID/secret pairs
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A
